checklist_items.title: Verify On-chain Identity Linking for Forum Accounts
checklist_items.description: Check if the Governance Forum requires users to link their forum account to a verified on-chain identity before submitting RFRVs.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot of forum account settings showing required on-chain link, or test submission attempt blocked without link.

checklist_items.title: Verify On-chain Signature/Txn for RFRV Submission
checklist_items.description: Check if RFRV submissions on the Governance Forum require a separate on-chain signature or transaction from the linked on-chain identity for final validation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require a separate on-chain signature or transaction to validate RFRV submission provenance.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Network logs showing required blockchain interaction upon RFRV submission, or test submission failing without valid signature/txn.

checklist_items.title: Verify forum account is tied to on-chain identity for RFRV submission
checklist_items.description: Check if the Governance Forum enforces that users submitting RFRVs must have their forum account linked to a verified on-chain identity (e.g., wallet address, ENS name) to prevent identity spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV. Standard forum authentication (username/password, email) is insufficient to tie identity to on-chain authority.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication for RFRV submissions, such as requiring the forum account to be linked to a verified on-chain identity (e.g., ENS name, wallet address) or using a Single Sign-On (SSO) system that verifies identity via a trusted source.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration details, screenshots of the RFRV submission process showing identity verification steps, or audit logs confirming linked identity used for submission.

checklist_items.title: Verify implementation of strong authentication for RFRV submission
checklist_items.description: Check if the Governance Forum requires and correctly verifies a strong authentication method (like linking to on-chain identity or SSO) for users submitting RFRVs, as per the planned mitigation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO) for RFRV submission.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshots of configuration, policy document, or design documentation showing the required authentication method is configured and enforced for RFRV submission functionality.

checklist_items.title: Automated test: Reject RFRV from unauthenticated identity
checklist_items.description: Develop and run an automated test case that attempts to submit an RFRV to the Governance Forum using an identity that has not completed the required strong authentication linking, verifying that the submission is rejected by the system.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO) for RFRV submission.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Test report showing the attempted RFRV submission from an unauthenticated identity failed, including relevant error messages or logs.

checklist_items.title: Verify multi-factor authentication (MFA) enforcement
checklist_items.description: Check if all user accounts are required to use multi-factor authentication during login attempts to prevent identity spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The application relies solely on password authentication.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration screenshot showing MFA enabled for users, or policy document specifying MFA requirement.

checklist_items.title: Check login attempt rate limiting
checklist_items.description: Verify that the login endpoint implements rate limiting to prevent brute-force and credential stuffing attacks linked to spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: No rate limiting is applied to login attempts.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement rate limiting on login attempts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Result of security scan or manual test demonstrating rate limiting is effective.

checklist_items.title: Review database access controls
checklist_items.description: Assess database access controls to ensure strict least privilege policies are enforced, preventing unauthorized data tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Database access controls are not strictly enforced.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce strict database access controls (least privilege).
checklist_items.evidence_required: Database user/role permission matrix, configuration audit report.

checklist_items.title: Validate input validation and sanitization on data submission
checklist_items.description: Check if the data submission API performs strong input validation and sanitization to prevent malicious data used for tampering.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong input validation and sanitization.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Output from security testing tools (e.g., fuzzer) showing rejection of malicious input.

checklist_items.title: Ensure forum account is tied to on-chain identity for RFRV submission
checklist_items.description: Check if forum users submitting RFRVs are verified through linking their forum account to a validated on-chain identity and if this linkage is enforced for submission.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Review of forum account settings and RFRV submission flow documentation/implementation to confirm mandatory linked on-chain identity.

checklist_items.title: Verify SSO integration configuration for forum login
checklist_items.description: Check if the Governance Forum utilizes Single Sign-On (SSO) with a trusted identity provider configured to perform strong authentication methods.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration settings of the forum's authentication module showing SSO provider details and configured authentication policies.

checklist_items.title: Verify RFRV submitters link to on-chain identity
checklist_items.description: Check that users submitting Request For Refinement Votes (RFRVs) on the Governance Forum are required to link their forum account to a verifiable on-chain identity before submission.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO) for RFRV submission.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or recording of the RFRV submission flow demonstrating the wallet connection requirement.

checklist_items.title: Test account creation defenses
checklist_items.description: Test if the Governance Forum implements rate limiting or CAPTCHA during account creation to prevent bulk account registration for spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Creating multiple forum accounts is easy and not tied to a unique, verifiable identity.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement rate limiting and CAPTCHA for account creation.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Results from automated tests attempting to create multiple accounts, demonstrating rate limiting or CAPTCHA effectiveness.

checklist_items.title: Ensure forum account is tied to on-chain identity
checklist_items.description: Check if forum users submitting RFRVs are verified through on-chain identity.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Verify SSO implementation for RFRV submission
checklist_items.description: Check if the Governance Forum uses a secure SSO mechanism (e.g., wallet signature) to authenticate users before allowing RFRV submission.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: SSO configuration details, successful test submission requiring SSO.
